title: scabiosa columbaria subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Scabiosa columbaria subsp. pyrenaica, also known as the Pyrenean scabious, is a perennial plant species belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae) and is native to the Pyrenees mountains. The plant's roots and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scabiosa columbaria subsp. pyrenaica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Scabiosa columbaria subsp. pyrenaica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
